chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-1357 of 2023 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ D/o Matter. 1. For orders on CMA No.20064/2025. (Urgency) 2. For orders on CMA No.20065/2025. (Restoration) 06.10.2025 Mr. Ahmed Ali Ghumro, advocate for the petitioner. ------------- 1) Urgency granted. 2) Vide order dated 15.09.2025, this petition was dismissed for non- prosecution. The order dated 15.09.2025 is set out below for ease of reference:- “None present for the petitioner without intimation. Vide order dated 27.02.2025, the petitioner was directed to satisfy this Court about maintainability of this petition. Today, none present for the petitioner without intimation and question of maintainability remains outstanding. It appears that petitioner has lost interest to pursue this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non- prosecution along with pending application.” We have heard learned counsel for the petitioner. We find that the petitioner has not made out his case for restoration of this petition, as such the restoration application is dismissed. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Shahzad Soomro
